name: Blue Nevada
subject: another Trump rally (fight back)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Team,
**Tomorrow, President Trump is expected to hold ANOTHER campaign rally in Nevada.**
He only lost Nevada by two points in 2016 -- and he's hoping to flip it red in November. We can't let that happen. We need to fight back to defend our progress and stop the GOP in their tracks.
**[Early and mail-in voting are already underway in Nevada -- we have no time to lose. Will you pitch in $5 now to keep Nevada blue and help Democrats win the 2020 fight?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201017-trump-rally?refcode=em201017i_4673&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Nevada is on the frontlines of the fight for our future. We've already made tremendous progress, including electing Jacky Rosen to the Senate in 2018. Now, we've got to do everything we can to elect and re-elect Democrats up and down the ballot and ensure Joe Biden wins our state.
And that's not all -- Jacky is also supporting Democratic Senate candidates across the country because the only way we can move this country forward is removing the Republican majority.
**[We need to defeat President Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP -- and the fight starts right here in Nevada. Can you rush in your $5 contribution now to join the fight?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201017-trump-rally?refcode=em201017i_4673&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Team Rosen

****[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201017-trump-rally?refcode=em201017i_4673&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d8502/4fbb2af3/20e0ccb6/5e81a26e/2326815989/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[🔊 Listen to my interview now!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/743e31be8ead6c60/dbb36b84ab597f21c3d6b838967d376c/35193) Friend, You might not have heard about this yet - but I recently [_**went on the Mark Levin Show to talk about my race for TX-22!**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/743e31be8ead6c60/2539afc568a3c59ec3d6b838967d376c/35193)

I drew a stark contrast between myself and Sri Kulkarni, while speaking about the AWESOME groundswell of support that I've been seeing from grassroots conservatives across the district. [🔊 Listen to my interview now!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/743e31be8ead6c60/abc03006440e44d9c3d6b838967d376c/35193) [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/743e31be8ead6c60/5e31628b0481ae29c3d6b838967d376c/35193) Service is going to win this race, Friend. It isn't going to be money - it's going to be selfless service. The Democrats are pouring MILLIONS into this race to try and tear me down. Everywhere you look, they've put out another negative ad against me to slander my name. But do you know what you don't see? __My opponent, Sri Kulkarni, serving the people of this district.
__ While I've been serving this community for 28 years, he thinks that he can come in and convince the constituents that he's about service by making a couple stops to hand out PPE.

If we're going to FLIP the house and retire the likes of Nancy Pelosi, taking this seat is KEY - and I can do it with your help. name: Senator Ed Markey
subject: This moment requires bold solutions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress
body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20460588/257070446/997664260?refcode=SGL_EM_FR_201018_Markey_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDBmNjNjNS00NjExLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DxN-5rz5M3VDZLpavrTc1IIVTRyNwVQ6ybmKdTad3lc=) Friend, our planet is facing an existential threat. In the face of a climate crisis, growing wealth inequality, and millions of uninsured Americans, progressives are stepping forward to offer the bold solutions that working people desperately need. If we’re going to pass a Green New Deal and our bold progressive agenda, then I need more allies in Congress. **That’s why I’m so proud to endorse Mike Siegel for Congress.** Mike is a true progressive. He understands that our planet is running out of time, and there are no emergency rooms for planets. He’s all-in to fight alongside me in Washington to pass the Green New Deal, but first, he needs our help to win his race in Texas. name: Trump Jobs
subject: Now Hiring New Jersey Trump Supporters!
body:
|

Stampede America has partnered with the Trump Campaign to deploy a team of Trump Supporters who can knock on doors and mobilize conservative to vote in the November 3 election. Canvassers will receive compensation of $25-$35/hr. Must be willing to travel to a battleground state. Travel and hotel stipend provided.

Holly Turner

Stampede America is a group of conservatives activists across the nation who engage voters on important issues in local, state, and federal elections and government. Our purpose is to help America’s conservative voices be heard, to maximize the positive impact they can have on our country and culture, and to push back against the fake news and professional misinformation campaigns run by liberals. For more information and to see other job opportunities, visit [www.stampedeamerica.com](https://stampedecampaings.com/stam/index.php/campaigns/qa9784c5vqd5c/track-url/pt474o9lkkf4f/d95e41cdc568efec0f532dbd41983a2a9becefd6)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Trump Trumps NBC, ACB One Step Closer to Court, Big Tech Protects Biden, and more
body:
I’m writing to let you know about a new website we’ve launched to make sure Tea Party Patriots has a place to post information that is beyond the reaches of Big Tech censorship. **You may have noticed we’ve been sending you links to[patriotproject.com](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkyLWJjNDQ1ZTJkMTdhNjRhYjFiMzUwZWE2ZmEzM2Y4OWRm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09dHBwbnRrJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMC0xMC0xNiZtaWQ9NDI4MzYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=YScUYILIxRn7o8VzsB_f0g) in recent weeks, and it’s this website that I want to introduce to you.** Some background: Earlier this year, we worked with America’s Frontline Doctors to bring hope and facts about coronavirus that the mainstream media and social media were not reporting – about available treatments, who is vulnerable, who is not vulnerable, and more. Our press conference was streamed live and before it was removed from virtually every social media platform, it had reached over 17 million views. Then Big Tech removed all of the videos. And after that, they began to remove some of the videos of interviews we’d done with doctors from across the country. Just this past week, we’ve all seen how Big Tech is working hand-in-hand with the Democrats and the left to shut down the bombshell news from the New York Post about Joe Biden and his corrupt family, less than three weeks before the Presidential election. These companies have become totalitarian, authoritarian, and stand against everyone America stands for. Big Tech’s censorship last week shows that it is more important than ever that we need a place to post news and information that won’t get censored by Big Tech. Here’s what we are asking you to do:
* [Bookmark the page](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkyLWJjNDQ1ZTJkMTdhNjRhYjFiMzUwZWE2ZmEzM2Y4OWRm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tLz9taWQ9NDI4MzYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=UvAPeqLMlesyG9ImptS3hA) on your internet browsers on your phone and computer
* Like [The Patriot Project Facebook page](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjkyLWJjNDQ1ZTJkMTdhNjRhYjFiMzUwZWE2ZmEzM2Y4OWRm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3BhdHJpb3Rwcm9qP21pZD00MjgzNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=9jgKXk4Wjt0j9t6S8p050A)

clean_body: I’m writing to let you know about a new website we’ve launched to make sure Tea Party Patriots has a place to post information that is beyond the reaches of Big Tech censorship. You may have noticed we’ve been sending you links to in recent weeks, and it’s this website that I want to introduce to you. Some background: Earlier this year, we worked with America’s Frontline Doctors to bring hope and facts about coronavirus that the mainstream media and social media were not reporting – about available treatments, who is vulnerable, who is not vulnerable, and more. Our press conference was streamed live and before it was removed from virtually every social media platform, it had reached over 17 million views. Then Big Tech removed all of the videos. And after that, they began to remove some of the videos of interviews we’d done with doctors from across the country. Just this past week, we’ve all seen how Big Tech is working hand-in-hand with the Democrats and the left to shut down the bombshell news from the New York Post about Joe Biden and his corrupt family, less than three weeks before the Presidential election. These companies have become totalitarian, authoritarian, and stand against everyone America stands for. Big Tech’s censorship last week shows that it is more important than ever that we need a place to post news and information that won’t get censored by Big Tech. Here’s what we are asking you to do: on your internet browsers on your phone and computer Like Tell others about this website and add it to your list of places where you get reliable news In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin Hunter Biden’s alleged emails are quite the item of discussion at the moment. There’d be more discussion, mind you, if the stories about it weren’t being censored on Twitter. | | Swing state Pennsylvania, which President Donald Trump narrowly won in the 2016 election, has thrown out 372,000 requests for mail-in ballots, a new report says. | Even if you’re the poll-watching type, there’s a pretty good chance you’ve never heard of the Democracy Institute. | Objective truth doesn’t matter to leftist journalists anymore. We do everything bigger in Texas, folks. And by the look of the first day of early voting, participation in the 2020 Election will be no different! After just one day of the polls being open we set a new record: **Over one million Texans cast their ballot.** That’s a truly Texas-sized number. But we can do more to elect responsible, pragmatic leadership right here the 17th District, statewide, and nationwide. Rick is excited for a future working with the next president and the next senator from Texas — Joe Biden and MJ Hegar — to make sure that we protect health care access, heal our economy, and create new jobs right here in Central Texas. **They share Rick’s pragmatic, compassionate approach to policy, and we deserve nothing less than that from our leaders in Washington.** But we can’t focus on the future until we win on November 3, and that means getting Rick’s message out to voters right now as voters are casting their ballots. [_**Can you chip in today so we can keep getting the word out about Rick? Just $10 goes a long way to flipping this seat from red to blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20463355/257084310/-1907457921?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201018records_TK_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTdlZDRhNC01MjExLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBsxrUWOBJhDSWUoEfoLyPf7L5J2D1eg4AIkCgqe9sE=) Thank you, Team Kennedy | | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: Rising case numbers, new guidance, and holiday plans
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a recap of the announcements from the past week.
If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iAUWly2vF_pLa9_y8rJV7JQ5b4FQy94ZOx-AxwhgnBLoQJk7MdGtfXSTEgNSwpYZJNXKHOH4Dv_jUZbofxXc3mKPaROgQsuBUh9lWEnivPegzdCzWQmEHwlozPNU316GWZRqJG57n-I_ATYVnTKT0ia2blqxR5LZmVzD5slUZVwGFL-CpCRVJZjZNRQsgk2ut7UZZ1eukH1RSS4jZ2jnMtbcEfjU-xopvSj4mIqtoW-tQ-esx4N0I8zdmPboWwtvAtQqLgzX60BaE6BOcxKCtx5vpz1bsgAYrPLsMMcIjQfSKgtwiMG90VZFd0Uof9lHxhJoVzVajwY=&c=033yZTlauD5KhPn51b4SjgIF7fftxW93UVGxgDABHep0_Vie07QuSQ==&ch=GkeSyPrCOXgqIbTzvw0Ghok_3jbp1RoNvTnOuKoopX4tKwVUBxWkGw==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
RISING CASE NUMBERS
We're seeing a concerning trend in our data. Our cases and hospitalizations have been slowly ticking up for the last couple of weeks, and it's becoming clear that we're trending in the wrong direction. We're seeing an overwhelming pattern of cases from small gatherings of family and friends - people who are complying with our gathering limit but are not wearing masks or socially distancing with those who don't live in their household.

This is how community transmission happens. We start to feel safe around a small group of people, and we take off our mask, share food, or sit close to one another. But then the people in that group go off to their families and to their workplaces, and a few cases quickly become many. That's what we're seeing in Rhode Island. The good news is that it's not too late to stop this trend. If we all buckle down now and recommit to being serious about following the rules, we can turn our situation around before it gets out of control.
| | |
---|---
|
NEW GUIDANCE

We need to be wearing masks more often. Anytime you're with people you don't live with -- wear a mask. Even if it's just with a small group of people in the comfort of your own home. Even if you're only going for a walk with a neighbor. We feel safe in these settings, and that's when the virus spreads. If we take off our masks, we could be spreading the virus without even knowing we have it, and our friends will then go into work and see their families, and it doesn't take long before it spirals. So let's make mask-wearing our default. Ask yourself, "Is there any reason I should NOT be wearing a mask right now?"

We also all need to be getting tested more often. Doing asymptomatic or "sentinel" testing is key to our overall testing strategy, and it is especially important now. It allows us to better understand where our problem areas are and take a more targeted, precise approach to our response. And it helps you better protect your friends and family when you may not even know you've been exposed.

If you fall into one of the groups that qualify for asymptomatic testing, which are listed [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iAUWly2vF_pLa9_y8rJV7JQ5b4FQy94ZOx-AxwhgnBLoQJk7MdGtfXSTEgNSwpYZ595Upj1c6HuqY8dajpOmGFFzhQLGo7csHX_yQAgymgMo-4pKOZhImq3HvOqRGJL_yBoGg6FTSAxP2mbuzJaE9LF_aFi-q6_YSsvxAiNuuzgWhzyYSUo-TfSLUgnLN3FV&c=033yZTlauD5KhPn51b4SjgIF7fftxW93UVGxgDABHep0_Vie07QuSQ==&ch=GkeSyPrCOXgqIbTzvw0Ghok_3jbp1RoNvTnOuKoopX4tKwVUBxWkGw==), please go to [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iAUWly2vF_pLa9_y8rJV7JQ5b4FQy94ZOx-AxwhgnBLoQJk7MdGtfRF54nXpuN1LFSeRCq5HMD8h3tC1CYQ0yJjcbVSHOfmFdTApD_a5js7bf3RkCRGZpL80a67b41hCbNPNdTpsRkM=&c=033yZTlauD5KhPn51b4SjgIF7fftxW93UVGxgDABHep0_Vie07QuSQ==&ch=GkeSyPrCOXgqIbTzvw0Ghok_3jbp1RoNvTnOuKoopX4tKwVUBxWkGw==) and sign up for a free test. Over the next week, we've set a goal of running 4,000 asymptomatic tests.
| | |
---|---
|
HOLIDAY PLANS

Halloween is two weeks away. Trick-or-treating will still be allowed, but it's going to look different this year. We're asking that you go in small groups, stay six feet apart, and wear cloth masks the entire time. In addition, we're asking everyone to do your trick-or-treating in the daylight. As it gets darker, it gets more challenging - and less safe - for kids to be spread out in the way they need to be. So this year, I'm asking families to start a bit earlier and be home before sunset.

Do not, under any circumstance, have a Halloween party. Cases and hospitalizations are rising, and your decision to have a party will put more people in the hospital.

I also know people are already starting to plan for Thanksgiving. Please, keep it local this year and do not travel. We've talked all along about how our actions impact the case numbers we see a few weeks later. Well, three weeks after Halloween is Thanksgiving. And a month after that is Christmas. We were under a stay-at-home order for Easter, and Passover, and Ramadan. None of us wants to be back under a stay-at-home order for Thanksgiving or Christmas. But if we don't recommit ourselves to following the rules today, then it's not out of the question.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stays engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. On Monday, I'll be talking to Dr. McDonald on my [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iAUWly2vF_pLa9_y8rJV7JQ5b4FQy94ZOx-AxwhgnBLoQJk7MdGtfYuFjYExmeCYLJFX0pmpShHCjuNrQ59mUFAecaX-uDYvqipK6-B7V2Fpz6fg6Ty1pmkV8VH4VuyvipVaaIHTGhhZic0nFAQz_NpX-RkYLIBu&c=033yZTlauD5KhPn51b4SjgIF7fftxW93UVGxgDABHep0_Vie07QuSQ==&ch=GkeSyPrCOXgqIbTzvw0Ghok_3jbp1RoNvTnOuKoopX4tKwVUBxWkGw==) page at 10 a.m. And I'll be back on TV with more updates Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iAUWly2vF_pLa9_y8rJV7JQ5b4FQy94ZOx-AxwhgnBLoQJk7MdGtfXSTEgNSwpYZbjkm2C2oi8MG779gn9r1Sxsbw4zbbbFehW06LuOA2-VgR5YqktA4pXu6JhKabXIBfLSI6w7zvaB70EIkCeJy1OgV3aOFLUMlh54C_y6LvN4sWm1vQoL2_BS9J8-QLYw3idNri_5EV1MEe-5v7mib6Yv6LqWgRmt0W45hM6w-iS3g2hagEw7EhLqGSsE0ycqOkZE8zDdn1YvaSWajVaeeJTBdj6IwW35hjTnZ1_7x1ksB3kA0uJI6PLRqqfD_1HtcGdOFbiyeS48=&c=033yZTlauD5KhPn51b4SjgIF7fftxW93UVGxgDABHep0_Vie07QuSQ==&ch=GkeSyPrCOXgqIbTzvw0Ghok_3jbp1RoNvTnOuKoopX4tKwVUBxWkGw==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=1cdab227-2f7e-4956-8517-bb1caeda8a48)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=1cdab227-2f7e-4956-8517-bb1caeda8a48) | [About our service provider](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/service-provider?cc=about-service-provider)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by
[ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE) [Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)

On Monday, I'll be talking to Dr. McDonald on my == page at 10 a.m. And I'll be back on TV with more updates Wednesday at 1 p.m. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

228 South Washington Street, Suite 115, Alexandria, VA 22314 CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS DISCLAIMER

The CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS (JFC) is a joint fundraising committee composed of: Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, Republican Party of Texas, and NRSC (each individually, a Committee and collectively, the Committees). Contributions or gifts to JFC, or any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

All contributions permissible under FECA, but which would cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit to a specific Committee, shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded to the contributor. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participating Committee, to the extent permissible by FECA. Any contributor may make his or her contribution directly payable to any Committee participating in JFC. Any such designated contribution that causes the contributor to exceed the contribution limit to the designated Committee shall not be reallocated by JFC absent the prior written permission of the contributor as required by law.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without green cards), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. No contributions to the NRSC Headquarters Account or the NRSC Legal Fund will be used to influence any federal election.

The maximum an individual or a federal non-multicandidate political committee may contribute to JFC is $266,300. The maximum amount a federal multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to JFC is $120,000. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. clean_body: Friend Texas is a swing state. Just the thought of those words once made me shudder but now it seems like it's becoming our new reality, Friend. That's right -- yesterday I got news that our race was DOWNGRADED to Lean R by the Cook Political Report! That means they think our state is increasing in likelihood of voting Democrat. If we're not careful, we could let the Radical Left run away with this thing. I know I can count on you. Will you chip in anything you can to help us recover from this troubling news and battle back? == == This isn't just about our race, Friend. Joe Biden is planning on blazing his path to the White House THROUGH TEXAS -- he really thinks he can flip it, and he's shown how serious he is. When Biden sees a close poll in our own backyard, he's going to spend BIG in an attempt to take ALL of Texas electoral votes. == John Cornyn \--------Forwarded Message Below-------- Friend, Coming to you with some troubling news. The Cook Political Report has DOWNGRADED our status. That's right they're now LESS CONFIDENT that we'll hold on to this Senate seat in November than they were before. Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden have been spending big in our own backyard, all in an effort to flip Texas BLUE. Now, they've gotten their first indication that their work is paying off. Friend, here's the thing News like this is going to send Schumer and Hollywood Hegar into a frenzy. They're going to do whatever it takes to seize the moment by calling on their coastal mega-donors. They'll pump even more cash from the Liberal Mob into Texas. Friend, we can't afford to let a moment like this pass without doing everything we can to right the ship. == == == == I need you to chip in anything you can right now to help us keep fighting, and to fend off the attacks that are sure to come. == Can I count on you to give it all you've got? body:
Sorry to bother you on a Sunday... but Trump might not win Florida! If we don't win this district, Trump might not win Florida! | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=50bbe9736a954b79b760631b06e153a6&_e=3ccOk5gkl0pnbgYisj8_WDOHTib-RsPvVlKtXfPRxIMwVUhmP7oTHW2rGrKWCwsS6JtQPnCD1n56iML0R9HgqTgz1A-8uxGbt5tRNBkDT4qYtIuwNMjkfUg31aar_xBmG_5WhVYPphaydEIn3hoQIVoHuy6MQu-bWLYf_9PbNyliBlluAeZ0AsS_jfKkXBCWhET4jV-btrqRxdkJbcaiskzKAWou1dryor5K2jgXs_S8km6l3K8mBFw_S6boMzBvc3eCrinq8Q0Q1Et_ccpnGN8ca01f08JdkWhCgWU7Ze7nzPBr7F9-_rcq_5rfGL9_tRGJP0cxmOCa9WRgNxzNgqpWIGbe43166pJwP6bDmZkfXMllPz4oRtAbZjHgai93D--_3E2rS1XxCECYpG8XOkMx1qKwNmA3klfndBd-mcg%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

If there has ever been a time when I could use your help, [**IT'S NOW!**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=50bbe9736a954b79b760631b06e153a6&_e=3ccOk5gkl0pnbgYisj8_WDOHTib-RsPvVlKtXfPRxIMwVUhmP7oTHW2rGrKWCwsS6JtQPnCD1n56iML0R9HgqTgz1A-8uxGbt5tRNBkDT4qYtIuwNMjkfUg31aar_xBmG_5WhVYPphaydEIn3hoQIVoHuy6MQu-bWLYf_9PbNyliBlluAeZ0AsS_jfKkXBCWhET4jV-btrqRxdkJbcaisot4Dszk1lfkmNEzfyjf5nzJBjOifN0P47qYsbk1M6GZ8YH8jee5ulmHxSrkes4Mv2_qkV55RlKOjTz80qU20oCD_HU1cTPXiEDZl0hAJWwvvz7CuBZYZMxOoF2yFBKbs3yGbJAlOpccrLulit-ldXLJqjv8kJjBJ-JI9y7dKgGeh5IrOCboTn4aJps9FlNFaUUcviDNc4993FSymfAJeRI%3D)

Recent polling suggests that if I don't win Florida's 23rd District, Florida might flip, and President Donald Trump might lose our support! [**Pledge $5, $10, $15, or even more today to help me make sure the Democrats don't steal Florida from us!**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=50bbe9736a954b79b760631b06e153a6&_e=3ccOk5gkl0pnbgYisj8_WDOHTib-RsPvVlKtXfPRxIMwVUhmP7oTHW2rGrKWCwsS6JtQPnCD1n56iML0R9HgqTgz1A-8uxGbt5tRNBkDT4qYtIuwNMjkfUg31aar_xBmG_5WhVYPphaydEIn3hoQIVoHuy6MQu-bWLYf_9PbNyliBlluAeZ0AsS_jfKkXBCWhET4jV-btrqRxdkJbcaisu_oRrBpyAfeREywFC8wCC-5F_SqBk8PRbARoDJl2dHk9Gr1sSOhFMyaUNKSmSB3kxQMDaj2YG_CKqEfP974tasWemXQGTLGPH-sNS-fPoKdpgHOoiw8IYB7mZW8l3vLEoxek0WciVd6cOIgU82-IpHv9Mi7CMwrtinhsZ-Yw6lHZ2CLwMrvYGYIkF2wGsHboGeQfFvHKTyAdWxUAvRK2RY%3D)

President Donald Trump has done so much for black communities, from incentivizing neighborhood investments, to forgiving the debt threatened to put many Historically Black Colleges and Universities out of business. Now I have to deliver for him and help him continue his vision for our Nation.

[**We need to flip Flordia's 23rd Congressional District.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=50bbe9736a954b79b760631b06e153a6&_e=3ccOk5gkl0pnbgYisj8_WDOHTib-RsPvVlKtXfPRxIMwVUhmP7oTHW2rGrKWCwsS6JtQPnCD1n56iML0R9HgqTgz1A-8uxGbt5tRNBkDT4qYtIuwNMjkfUg31aar_xBmG_5WhVYPphaydEIn3hoQIVoHuy6MQu-bWLYf_9PbNyliBlluAeZ0AsS_jfKkXBCWhET4jV-btrqRxdkJbcaisluM5_iLjkVMtsVqbLIWmiQ03APx_ON8KiUvkIfmCmYyPUmnFjdszLeHfJiwY963hritYM_OjwsLrR8W_VNoaA24WHdx5qtHQuKkj0EouOa7FcR0x_-cICwiN5g25v4ZITZnvsGJG9NktClXHp_ZPG7Zy6SCm1t7Ut22a0CjIR6ZMlQGZSAjRyQ5b3m00Cid42WokEKYR-k-BlPCKSwrTGQ%3D)

| [**SAVE FLORIDA FROM THE LEFT**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=50bbe9736a954b79b760631b06e153a6&_e=3ccOk5gkl0pnbgYisj8_WDOHTib-RsPvVlKtXfPRxIMwVUhmP7oTHW2rGrKWCwsS6JtQPnCD1n56iML0R9HgqTgz1A-8uxGbt5tRNBkDT4qYtIuwNMjkfUg31aar_xBmG_5WhVYPphaydEIn3hoQIVoHuy6MQu-bWLYf_9PbNyliBlluAeZ0AsS_jfKkXBCWhET4jV-btrqRxdkJbcaisq_dkrjzt7fYw3wuQuAPEpqQLu6AoPnLH3EOpAN9oU5YOFIfGntPYkEyBjr6khokQ1JgacSG-uKKdd23TlDKCTe7gmu7wUXBc9nkp_7GLndJ8LvVsuk7AsNUZ0xmgGq8K42GRnPku2Xt4WIkc5Gbf96CNvJohp0hL-DlFWJuM2V-dWjeE4c7PP9P3zNMaq97yg4rLieo5yiX-lFKWRuKi7s%3D)
---

The Democrats fail our black communities time and time again, yet these same communities are where they seem to get their support! As a black woman, _and an immigrant,_**I cannot and will not stand to allow the left to continue manipulating our community.**

If Democrats in Congress can fail our black communities,**just imagine what a radical left President, House, and Senate will do.**

If we allow them, Democrats will repeal Trump's Tax cuts, pass the Green New Deal and further promote their crazy socialist agenda.

I won't allow it, and you shouldn't either! [**Can I count on your $5?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=50bbe9736a954b79b760631b06e153a6&_e=3ccOk5gkl0pnbgYisj8_WDOHTib-RsPvVlKtXfPRxIMwVUhmP7oTHW2rGrKWCwsS6JtQPnCD1n56iML0R9HgqTgz1A-8uxGbt5tRNBkDT4qYtIuwNMjkfUg31aar_xBmG_5WhVYPphaydEIn3hoQIVoHuy6MQu-bWLYf_9PbNyliBlluAeZ0AsS_jfKkXBCWhET4jV-btrqRxdkJbcaislS1Sd8LXqljRdzaVaJ42ESkpR28V50cKJMKqugbpPUoKOyV2tFRe8NoAkCK3ses3yC0I6EKVIYM_pp7pMIJdqtTtxfyU0wQ5ZmsxCscN3K0on9RxGS5OD5GfEZMvykGCArtVBcpMLs1XHEESrJGFPgBZf9AC_BzXDQajQ17gs8EjP1QmluFHJorVQFkqYQp4QkH9FZPX3xYlN03Zpnevoc%3D)

[**SAVE FLORIDA FROM THE LEFT**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=50bbe9736a954b79b760631b06e153a6&_e=3ccOk5gkl0pnbgYisj8_WDOHTib-RsPvVlKtXfPRxIMwVUhmP7oTHW2rGrKWCwsS6JtQPnCD1n56iML0R9HgqTgz1A-8uxGbt5tRNBkDT4qYtIuwNMjkfUg31aar_xBmG_5WhVYPphaydEIn3hoQIVoHuy6MQu-bWLYf_9PbNyliBlluAeZ0AsS_jfKkXBCWhET4jV-btrqRxdkJbcaistqRUdaPJ5agIuCCh7t99vxdlt4vK-g5ykN7X6Fhxt3v8K69HmLck__itWstNSjkEtwaz9wWgpB7j7xd_dPRWE64F5OVPusSeS_y6rmpNe3oOxcvFBOKTuWFrlaswqXJaCG8dEOVHyt4mB9qEt4sJKyK-0feEc-eMfnPFOd2pvV8IOuYhtiREPHnYM0GPekKo0TN_EAo5gD0afiJT4vxC5A%3D)
---

Thank you,

Carla Spalding
Black. Veteran. Immigrant.
Republican for Congress

Friend, do you have a minute? It's urgent.

**Our opponent is spending hundreds of thousands of dollars on a television campaign against us,** _attacking our conservative values._ Under no circumstances, can we take this lying down -- we CANNOT let Pelosi's mega-donors and Hollywood's max-out checks buy this seat out from under us.

Asking for money is my least favorite part about running for office. I'd much rather focus on creating jobs, lowering taxes, reducing small business-crushing regulations, and getting our country back on track. But unfortunately, our opponent is deep in Hollywood's checkbook and we need to have the resources to fight back.

Nancy Pelosi won't stop until she's silenced every conservative voice in California. The Left is pumping in hundreds of thousands of dollars against us and with only 16 days to go, we can't take any chances. name: Joni Ernst
subject: Help me fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa PO BOX 93441 Des Moines, IA 50393
body:
From day one, it's been my top priority to fight for Iowa and to put Iowans first, even if that means going against the status quo. I've always stood up for what I believe in, and I always will.
From day one, it's been my top priority to fight for Iowa and to put Iowans first, even if that means going against the status quo. I've always stood up for what I believe in, and I always will.

Look, Friend, I'm a mother, a soldier, and a leader. After serving our nation both overseas and here at home, I know what it's like to stand up to the enemy, and fight for what you believe in.

I've carried this attitude with me from the Army, and now on to the Senate. name: Joe Biden
subject: My friend Mark.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | We're just 16 days out from Election Day, Derek.

Make no mistake: We're in a battle for the soul of our nation, and winning in Virginia is critical to making sure that we get Donald Trump out of the White House, so we can start building our country back.

**Here 's the thing, though. Winning the White House isn't enough to make the kind of change we need to see in this country.** It's so important that we have a Democratic majority in the Senate as well. And to do that, it's absolutely necessary to hang onto the seats we already have -- seats like Mark Warner's. I've seen the way that Mark has worked during this pandemic and during his entire time in public service to make sure that people have what they need to thrive. We need more folks like him representing us.

**[Can you donate $10-- or whatever makes sense with your budget -- to help send Mark back to the Senate and send me and Kamala Harris to the White House?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da22/53d9897e/554d0165/1c88f8d5/2506921926/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-biden?refcode=20201018_f_1_nd__877__&refcode2=ask1&amount=10")**

Building this country back better is going to take a lot of hard work. I know that Mark is ready to roll up his sleeves and work until the job is done -- that's why I'm so eager to get him back in the Senate.

When we put our minds to it and put in the work, we can make great change happen in this country. And I'm asking you to stand with me and with my friend Mark and help get both of our campaigns to the finish line.

**Derek, will you split $10 between my campaign and Mark 's campaign to help us in the homestretch?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through subject: In 16 days, we're going to flip IL16
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dcc9e37a2b11/in-16-days-were-going-to-flip-il16?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | **Today marks 16 days until Election Day polling locations open up and final votes are cast.**

I am running to flip the last Republican-held seat in Northern Illinois from red to blue. My opponent **opposes** LGBTQ worker protections, the freedom to choose, collective bargaining rights, real COVID-19 relief, and fighting the climate crisis. He has turned his back on women, the LGBTQ community, workers, and farmers.

So, who _does_ he stand for? His corporate PAC donors and special interest groups.

It’s time the people of IL16 have real representation - and I’m fighting like hell to give it to them. When I am elected, I will follow through on my promises, and be the type of Representative who doesn’t just talk about bipartisanship on TV interviews, but actually does it.**I won’t turn my back on anyone.**

My Republican opponent thinks that he can get away with ignoring the needs of the people of this district and that they will just keep reelecting him because he’s got an “R” after his name. But he is dead wrong.

While he is focused on being a talking head in the national media circuit and doing the bidding of his corporate donors, I am here on the ground talking to the voters of the Illinois 16th. And that is why we are going to win.

**This November, we’re going to catch a Republican incumbent sleeping at the wheel. We saw this happen all over the country in 2018, and it’s happening again here in IL16 in 16 days. **

_[Can I count on you to chip in $16 and be a part of what will be one of the biggest political upsets of 2020?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f78883c2fe&e=140a9b81e7)_

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL16

clean_body: | | | | | | | Today marks 16 days until Election Day polling locations open up and final votes are cast. I am running to flip the last Republican-held seat in Northern Illinois from red to blue. My opponent opposes LGBTQ worker protections, the freedom to choose, collective bargaining rights, real COVID-19 relief, and fighting the climate crisis. He has turned his back on women, the LGBTQ community, workers, and farmers. So, who does he stand for? His corporate PAC donors and special interest groups. It’s time the people of IL16 have real representation - and I’m fighting like hell to give it to them. When I am elected, I will follow through on my promises, and be the type of Representative who doesn’t just talk about bipartisanship on TV interviews, but actually does it.I won’t turn my back on anyone. My Republican opponent thinks that he can get away with ignoring the needs of the people of this district and that they will just keep reelecting him because he’s got an “R” after his name. But he is dead wrong. While he is focused on being a talking head in the national media circuit and doing the bidding of his corporate donors, I am here on the ground talking to the voters of the Illinois 16th. And that is why we are going to win. This November, we’re going to catch a Republican incumbent sleeping at the wheel. We saw this happen all over the country in 2018, and it’s happening again here in IL16 in 16 days. Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL16 | "Chip in here" | | | | | | | | | | | www.daniforillinois.com | | Copyright © 2020 Dani for Illinois, All rights reserved.

subject: 16 days will go by in the blink of an eye
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We can't let our momentum collapse.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c54/7f51f7bc/466a1860/4efbee2a/3396849623/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **16 Days Out**
24-Hour Goal: **$185,000**
Deadline: MIDNIGHT
---

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c54/7f51f7bc/466a1860/4efbee29/3396849623/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201018.1nd__2330__&amount=10")
---
Peter, _the election is in**16 days**_ and early voting has already started across Texas!

We're firing on all cylinders here, but I did want to take a quick moment to reach out to you. Though we're right on the cusp of beating Sen. John Cornyn, _we'll lose this chance if our momentum collapses._

**So I just talked to my finance team, and we've set a 24-hour goal of raising $185,000 before midnight to keep our momentum going. ****[Can I count on you to chip in?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c54/7f51f7bc/466a1860/4efbee29/3396849623/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201018.1nd__2330__&amount=10")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c54/7f51f7bc/466a1860/4efbee28/3396849623/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201018.1nd__2330__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c54/7f51f7bc/466a1860/4efbee2f/3396849623/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201018.1nd__2330__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c54/7f51f7bc/466a1860/4efbee2e/3396849623/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201018.1nd__2330__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c54/7f51f7bc/466a1860/4efbee2d/3396849623/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20201018.1nd__2330__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c54/7f51f7bc/466a1860/4efbee2c/3396849623/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201018.1nd__2330__")**
**Unprecedented numbers** of Texans have already voted in this election, so we're running out of time to persuade undecided voters to come off the fence.

**[16 days will go by in the blink of an eye. Election Day is almost here. Make a donation ASAP to our 24-hour goal to help us raise $185,000 by midnight!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c54/7f51f7bc/466a1860/4efbee29/3396849623/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201018.1nd__2330__&amount=10")**

Thanks y'all,
MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c54/7f51f7bc/466a1860/4efbee29/3396849623/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201018.1nd__2330__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c54/7f51f7bc/466a1860/4efbee23/3396849623/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMzAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2330&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c54/7f51f7bc/466a1860/4efbee22/3396849623/VEsHBw/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

subject: They showed up at my house!
body:
Antifa on my driveway

| Patriot,
The left has gone too far. They have no respect or decency. This morning as my husband - a first responder - was driving to work to do his job protecting our communities, he was faced with a group of ANTIFA protestors at the end of OUR DRIVEWAY!

| The hateful sentiment the radical left is spreading towards the police is hurting our communities and is driving people to threaten, harass, and harm others. Not only did they invade our privacy and threatened our security, but they have also shown that they have no respect for personal property and service. This is happening across our country and it needs to stop.
The Antifa and socialist Green New Deal supporters that showed up this morning picked the wrong family to try to intimidate.
When the Washington establishment came for me \- I didn't back down.
When President Obama tried to destroy our way of life and forced my family into homelessness - I didn't back down.
And now... the radical left has come for me...but I won't back down!

_**PETER! PETER! PETER!**_ We’re sorry to bother you on a Sunday, but this is important. This Wednesday, we are hosting our [final town hall of the campaign on Facebook Live!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=23858f860f&e=140a9b81e7) Join us, and ask any questions you have.

This will be our 11th town hall since January, counting our in-person town halls from before the COVID pandemic. In order to guarantee your question gets answered, [fill out this form with your question!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=47f893ac4c&e=140a9b81e7)

Dave McCarver

name: Lee Griffin For Congress
subject: Lee's Newsletter
body:
Hi everyone - I hope you’ve had a good week. Last week I was honored to be endorsed by the Democratic Jewish Outreach Pennsylvania. I
| | [**Can't See This Message?**_View in a browser_****](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/63NKyTBOu/c?w=-YLoe9D0tGJMXrt55KLEXkDiIxupsOtvCNB8PRJTc_4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGVlZ3JpZmZpbmZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS9zby82M05LeVRCT3UiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Hi everyone - I hope you've had a good week. Last week I was honored to be endorsed by the Democratic Jewish Outreach Pennsylvania. I am committed to serving constituents of all faiths in the 12th district and making sure that everyone's voices are heard. I am grateful to the Democratic Jewish Outreach Pennsylvania for their support and will work for our shared values in Washington. We had a wonderful experience on our tour of the district, making stops in all 15 counties and talking with voters about the issues most important to them. The fall beauty of our area was on full display and the warmth and hospitality of our communities encouraged and inspired me. To view photos and highlights from the trip, please check out our Instagram and Facebook pages. On Sunday morning, we stopped in Tunkhannock to meet with the Wyoming County Democrats to hear their concerns about keeping jobs in rural Pennsylvania. Then we headed up to the Susquehanna County Democratic headquarters in Hallstead to talk with voters about supporting family farms during the pandemic and in the future. We spent Monday morning in Bradford County, stopping in at the Mad Hatter Cafe in Sayre. We talked about the impact of the pandemic on small businesses, particularly sole proprietors who struggled to access stimulus funding. We were in Tioga County in the evening at the Deane Center in Wellsboro holding a town hall on rural issues, including broadband access, healthcare and engaging young voters. On Tuesday morning we travelled to Coudersport to speak to the Potter County Democrats about supporting our schools, students and educators during the pandemic and beyond. In the evening, we were in Lock Haven where I participated in the Clinton County Christian Coalition's candidate forum with Congressman Keller. I was thrilled to finally have the opportunity to appear before voters and contrast my views with my opponent. While Mr. Keller skirted around answering the questions the moderator asked of us, I made it a point to be specific and answer directly so that voters can know where I stand. The full video is available on the CCCC Facebook page. We popped into Lewistown on Wednesday morning to talk with Mifflin County voters about how important it is to bridge the partisan divide when representing rural communities. Then we were off to Centre County, stopping at Duffy's Tavern in Boalsburg for lunch before our virtual town hall on healthcare at the Centre County Democrats' headquarters in State College. On Thursday we stopped to chat with Juniata County voters over lunch at The Bread of Life restaurant in McAlisterville, where we talked about bringing decency and respectability back to politics. Then in the evening I joined the Perry County Democrats at their monthly meeting in New Bloomfield, where we discussed voter suppression and the importance of making our voices heard on the ballot. We were in Cameron Park in Sunbury on Friday morning with Northumberland County voters discussing a wide range of issues, including the important role of science in governmental policy and decision-making. In the evening we were in Lewisburg at the Union County Democrats' headquarters talking with voters about veterans' issues and making VA services more accessible to our area's veterans. On Saturday morning we stopped in at various places including the Selinsgrove Farmers Market to talk with Snyder County voters about how we need a return to civility and decency in our policies and our public conversation. The tour culminated on Saturday evening with an online event where I was honored to be joined by Congresswoman Chrissy Houlahan, Auditor General Candidate Nina Ahmad and several of our candidates for state office. Senator Bob Casey sent a heartwarming greeting to us, as well. It was inspiring to hear from such amazing current and future leaders and I am grateful for their time and support. After travelling 754 miles through 15 counties in 8 days, I am more excited than ever for the opportunity to represent you in Washington. Thank you to everyone who stopped to speak with me, to share their concerns and views and to show their support. This campaign is about you and I wouldn't be able to do it without your help. We have 18 days left to give it everything we can. Tomorrow is the last day to register to vote. Please make sure you have a plan in place to vote and make your voice heard in this election. Thank you so much for your belief in me and this campaign. Together we can do this. The future is ours. Lee
---
| Follow Us Below
---

clean_body: Hi everyone - I hope you’ve had a good week. Last week I was honored to be endorsed by the Democratic Jewish Outreach Pennsylvania. I | | | | | | | | | | | Hi everyone - I hope you've had a good week. Last week I was honored to be endorsed by the Democratic Jewish Outreach Pennsylvania. I am committed to serving constituents of all faiths in the 12th district and making sure that everyone's voices are heard. I am grateful to the Democratic Jewish Outreach Pennsylvania for their support and will work for our shared values in Washington. We had a wonderful experience on our tour of the district, making stops in all 15 counties and talking with voters about the issues most important to them. The fall beauty of our area was on full display and the warmth and hospitality of our communities encouraged and inspired me. To view photos and highlights from the trip, please check out our Instagram and Facebook pages. On Sunday morning, we stopped in Tunkhannock to meet with the Wyoming County Democrats to hear their concerns about keeping jobs in rural Pennsylvania. Then we headed up to the Susquehanna County Democratic headquarters in Hallstead to talk with voters about supporting family farms during the pandemic and in the future. We spent Monday morning in Bradford County, stopping in at the Mad Hatter Cafe in Sayre. We talked about the impact of the pandemic on small businesses, particularly sole proprietors who struggled to access stimulus funding. We were in Tioga County in the evening at the Deane Center in Wellsboro holding a town hall on rural issues, including broadband access, healthcare and engaging young voters. On Tuesday morning we travelled to Coudersport to speak to the Potter County Democrats about supporting our schools, students and educators during the pandemic and beyond. In the evening, we were in Lock Haven where I participated in the Clinton County Christian Coalition's candidate forum with Congressman Keller. I was thrilled to finally have the opportunity to appear before voters and contrast my views with my opponent. While Mr. Keller skirted around answering the questions the moderator asked of us, I made it a point to be specific and answer directly so that voters can know where I stand. The full video is available on the CCCC Facebook page. We popped into Lewistown on Wednesday morning to talk with Mifflin County voters about how important it is to bridge the partisan divide when representing rural communities. Then we were off to Centre County, stopping at Duffy's Tavern in Boalsburg for lunch before our virtual town hall on healthcare at the Centre County Democrats' headquarters in State College. On Thursday we stopped to chat with Juniata County voters over lunch at The Bread of Life restaurant in McAlisterville, where we talked about bringing decency and respectability back to politics. Then in the evening I joined the Perry County Democrats at their monthly meeting in New Bloomfield, where we discussed voter suppression and the importance of making our voices heard on the ballot. We were in Cameron Park in Sunbury on Friday morning with Northumberland County voters discussing a wide range of issues, including the important role of science in governmental policy and decision-making. In the evening we were in Lewisburg at the Union County Democrats' headquarters talking with voters about veterans' issues and making VA services more accessible to our area's veterans. On Saturday morning we stopped in at various places including the Selinsgrove Farmers Market to talk with Snyder County voters about how we need a return to civility and decency in our policies and our public conversation. The tour culminated on Saturday evening with an online event where I was honored to be joined by Congresswoman Chrissy Houlahan, Auditor General Candidate Nina Ahmad and several of our candidates for state office. Senator Bob Casey sent a heartwarming greeting to us, as well. It was inspiring to hear from such amazing current and future leaders and I am grateful for their time and support. After travelling 754 miles through 15 counties in 8 days, I am more excited than ever for the opportunity to represent you in Washington. Thank you to everyone who stopped to speak with me, to share their concerns and views and to show their support. This campaign is about you and I wouldn't be able to do it without your help. We have 18 days left to give it everything we can. Tomorrow is the last day to register to vote. Please make sure you have a plan in place to vote and make your voice heard in this election. Thank you so much for your belief in me and this campaign. Together we can do this. The future is ours. Lee | Follow Us Below | | | | | | | Share Via: | | | |

Friend, Here we go again... Did you see the [Buffalo News article](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/763ijL75wp9KNqTgEY34lLmA/6892sW4YWjxUUs892hPoZru9XQ)? _**Nate McMurray is officially unhinged**_ , and once again, he's added to absurd and bizarre statements he has made on Twitter. clean_body: I’m sharing this with you because you got us to where we are today. | Friend, Because you’ve been a trusted member of our campaign, I wanted to share with you an internal poll we just conducted. I am now tied - within the margin of error - with Democrat Lizzie Fletcher. ...And 7% of voters are still undecided. With early voting already happening in Texas, we’re racing against the clock to take the lead. Because we’ve worked so hard to come this far, we need to make sure we do everything we can to surge ahead, so I’ve secured a 3X-MATCH for the next HOUR. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Now is our chance to take it back!
But she needs your help to do it. Can you make an emergency donation now to support Nancy Mace? Friend, I can’t tell you how nice it would be to have a conservative House of Representatives that works ALONGSIDE the Senate - not against us.
If Republicans want to take back the majority - this is a MUST WIN seat. And Nancy is the right person to do it!
Her inspiring life story makes her the ideal leader to represent the great people of South Carolina’s First District.
She’s a trailblazer. She’s broken glass ceilings and overcome every barrier. She’s a great mom, a great leader, and at a time like this we need someone with her grit and determination in Washington.
We need someone who won’t back down from the fight against radicals who threaten our families, our values, and our future.
_Nancy Mace is that person._
But here’s the thing: she can’t get to Washington to fight for you if we don’t stand together now to support her campaign.
Please, don’t hesitate to chip in now.

clean_body: With just a few short weeks till Election Day and one thing is clear: we can not afford to let the Democrats win in 2020. Friend, With just a few short weeks till Election Day and one thing is clear: we can not afford to let the Democrats win in 2020. Our laws, our courts, and our future are on the line. And we know that Republican victory this year is going to come down to a few key races... That’s why I am supporting Nancy Mace for Congress. Nancy Mace is running for Congress in her home district in the Lowcountry of South Carolina. This district is one Republicans controlled for decades until 2018 when the so-called “blue wave” stole the seat from us. Now is our chance to take it back! But she needs your help to do it. Can you make an emergency donation now to support Nancy Mace? Friend, I can’t tell you how nice it would be to have a conservative House of Representatives that works ALONGSIDE the Senate - not against us. If Republicans want to take back the majority - this is a MUST WIN seat. And Nancy is the right person to do it! Her inspiring life story makes her the ideal leader to represent the great people of South Carolina’s First District. She’s a trailblazer. She’s broken glass ceilings and overcome every barrier. She’s a great mom, a great leader, and at a time like this we need someone with her grit and determination in Washington. We need someone who won’t back down from the fight against radicals who threaten our families, our values, and our future. Nancy Mace is that person. But here’s the thing: she can’t get to Washington to fight for you if we don’t stand together now to support her campaign. Please, don’t hesitate to chip in now. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. Sincerely, Marsha Blackburn | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Team Warner
subject: Your weekly update.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da30/53d9897e/554f7909/1c88f870/504882085/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

Mark Warner is working hard in the Senate to make life better for every Virginian. Our team will continue to send these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with Mark's priorities.

**Here 's what Mark is working on right now:**
* Mark participated in his [**final debate**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da30/53d9897e/554f7909/1c88f87f/504882085/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wsls.com/decision-2020/2020/10/13/watch-live-us-senate-candidates-mark-warner-daniel-gade-meet-for-their-third-debate/") against his GOP opponent in Richmond on Tuesday. Mark once again delivered a winning performance, sharing his plans to strengthen Virginia's economy and combat the coronavirus.

* [**Mark released his latest campaign ad, "Virginia is Everything."**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da30/53d9897e/554f7909/1c88f87e/504882085/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/mark-warner-gets-personal-in-new-campaign-ad-virginia-is-everything/") Since his time as governor, Mark has been committed to making sure that every Virginian has a fair shot at success, and will continue to focus on creating solutions for the challenges our country faces.

* With fewer than 20 days until the election on November 3rd, [**Mark spoke out against**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da30/53d9897e/554f7909/1c88f87d/504882085/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://patch.com/virginia/fairfaxcity/va-senator-meets-voters-worries-peaceful-transfer-power") the President's refusal to commit to accept the results of the election and ensure a peaceful transfer of power.

* Mark received endorsements from [**five public sector labor groups**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da30/53d9897e/554f7909/1c88f87c/504882085/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/mark-warner-gets-endorsements-from-five-public-sector-labor-groups/"), highlighting his commitment to Virginia workers and his long record of supporting our career public servants.

* Mark spoke with WFIR News Talk Radio about [**expanding broadband access**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da30/53d9897e/554f7909/1c88f87b/504882085/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://wfirnews.com/news/warner-says-broadband-access-is-an-infrastructure-issue") for Americans, an issue that has been exacerbated by the coronavirus pandemic. Mark will continue to work to ensure that every Virginian -- and American -- has access to reliable, affordable broadband.

* With outdoor seating becoming limited due to the colder weather and vibrant restaurant scenes in danger, [**Mark continued pushing for federal assistance to help restaurants**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da30/53d9897e/554f7909/1c88f87a/504882085/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wric.com/news/without-federal-relief-some-warn-richmonds-restaurant-scene-could-disappear/") stay afloat and keep their workers on the payroll during the pandemic.

* Mark and Rep. Abigail Spanberger [**greeted early voters in Henrico**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da30/53d9897e/554f7909/1c88f879/504882085/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-spanberger-urge-registration-early-voting/") last weekend, and encouraged those who can to vote early. More than one million Virginians have cast their vote in this critical election, and if you can, make a plan to vote early from now through the last day on October 31st.

* Early voting is underway in Virginia -- more than a million Virginians have already cast their ballots! There's still time to cast your ballot early; early voting goes until October 31st. If you'd like to cast your ballot by mail with a no-excuse absentee ballot, the deadline to request that ballot is October 23rd. Visit **[iwillvote.com](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da30/53d9897e/554f7909/1c88f878/504882085/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "http://iwillvote.com")** to learn more about your options to cast your ballot this year.

Thank you for your continued support.

-- Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da30/53d9897e/554f7909/1c88f867/504882085/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20201018_e_2_fl__884__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---
|

Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Betsy
subject: National attention on my message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
I was born in Appalachia and grew up poor in a household headed by a single mother of four. I worked hard to escape poverty and everyone I knew was working just as hard to make ends meet. I worked my way through Ohio State and earned a scholarship to Yale Law School. Now I am an attorney who stands up for the rights of workers, including victims of sexual harassment, as well as abused children. My background is similar to the one described in Hillbilly Elegy, which is why I'm proud The Hill quoted me in their recent article about the unfair stereotypes of the working poor: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZO1VjDd0XVeQTDQSlz-4HkKJ5llZ3Tiiycjpa1RbPz4=/tqcJjpImk5yNxKvFoOvKHz-z9P3PjSqWrsSRvFiUrHQ=) Many Ohioans today are working hard but can't break the cycle of poverty. Drug companies enriched themselves on the backs of Ohio families broken by addiction. My story of working my way out of poverty is one of individual hard work but also acts of help and kindness from others -both from community members and government assistance. As Hillbilly Elegy gains attraction in advance of its movie premiere, please take a few minutes to [read my Washington Post article](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZO1VjDd0XVeQTDQSlz-4HkKJ5llZ3Tiiycjpa1RbPz4=/WnFB-KnIOhM_G-k_oZzpwi3_z6w7CfTfZStMUenXJEo=) and share with friends to spread the message that we need to elect people to office who understand real people's lives. [**After you read my Washington Post article, **](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZO1VjDd0XVeQTDQSlz-4HkKJ5llZ3Tiiycjpa1RbPz4=/grdgMMj2VZCf-AFBsAaFMXtN8ztYUZYKVwY-mwUvwrk=?refcode=10.19)**[I hope you'll consider making a contribution to my race for State Senate](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZO1VjDd0XVeQTDQSlz-4HkKJ5llZ3Tiiycjpa1RbPz4=/grdgMMj2VZCf-AFBsAaFMXtN8ztYUZYKVwY-mwUvwrk=?refcode=10.19).** I'm under attack from the big money special interests who desperately want the status quo to remain unchanged. But I can work harder than just about anyone you've ever met and I'll do what it takes to get people back on their feet. It's who I've been and who I'll continue to be in the State Senate. Please help me get there. Sincerely, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZO1VjDd0XVeQTDQSlz-4HkKJ5llZ3Tiiycjpa1RbPz4=/SB8cXeKRh9eVnzAqzMn4g5YtNmK3kF-IcKQW91ohdp8=?refcode=10.19&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZO1VjDd0XVeQTDQSlz-4HkKJ5llZ3Tiiycjpa1RbPz4=/SB8cXeKRh9eVnzAqzMn4g5YtNmK3kF-IcKQW91ohdp8=?refcode=10.19&amount=50) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZO1VjDd0XVeQTDQSlz-4HkKJ5llZ3Tiiycjpa1RbPz4=/SB8cXeKRh9eVnzAqzMn4g5YtNmK3kF-IcKQW91ohdp8=?refcode=10.19&amount=25) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZO1VjDd0XVeQTDQSlz-4HkKJ5llZ3Tiiycjpa1RbPz4=/SB8cXeKRh9eVnzAqzMn4g5YtNmK3kF-IcKQW91ohdp8=?refcode=10.19&amount=100) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZO1VjDd0XVeQTDQSlz-4HkKJ5llZ3Tiiycjpa1RbPz4=/SB8cXeKRh9eVnzAqzMn4g5YtNmK3kF-IcKQW91ohdp8=?refcode=10.19)
* * *

Friend,

Did you watch my Make America Great Again Rally in Nevada?

IT WAS EPIC!

There’s nothing I love more than being with the American People. In fact, it’s my favorite part about being YOUR President.

I know the Fake News media will only LIE about our HISTORIC event - they always do - and that’s why I’m coming straight to YOU for the TRUTH.

| | Friend, There are just over two weeks left until the election. Our program is nearly locked into place and our goal for the next two weeks is to grow our House DFL Majority. Additionally, tomorrow is the final campaign finance deadline before the election. You've helped us so much this year, and I will always be grateful for that. **I am asking you one last time, will you make an investment in our campaign to protect & grow the House DFL Majority?** [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BFMsFZ2AOMdi8F99bbGb6THbz9p0corOeKcxUyVh9JQ=/OKc9aym-f6tbqPk-cZb7q-IZZKoZvH-iwxI2cxW_Lpc=?refcode=101820) Don't forget, if you haven't donated yet this year, **Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and have it refunded by the state through the Minnesota PCR Program.** Take advantage of this program before it is too late. To be blunt: this is it. The most important election of our lifetimes is just over two weeks away. Let's finish strong. Together, we can grow our majority, flip the Minnesota Senate, and take back the White House. Thank you, Sean Herring Campaign Manager Minnesota House DFL Campaign [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BFMsFZ2AOMdi8F99bbGb6THbz9p0corOeKcxUyVh9JQ=/OKc9aym-f6tbqPk-cZb7q-IZZKoZvH-iwxI2cxW_Lpc=?refcode=101820)

subject: Trump announced on 𝗙𝗢𝗫 𝗡𝗲𝘄𝘀:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
We literally could not believe what we heard.

| Peter -- We are seething with rage right now.

**Trump flat-out ADMITTED on FOX News that his plot to destroy to the Postal Service is _all about ruining Vote-By-Mail_.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/20480882/257160783/-1843026337?refcode=VC_UD_20201018_EMPET_E1_T0-S0SL0C0_IN-1_TrumpFOX-Postal_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4ZWNlNGI2LWExMTEtZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ewtbDHGXK0SVgaWDAPuIl2MkdtJW6DMQ2xJaJFbV5Ow=&emci=afd35fab-9811-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=c8ece4b6-a111-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=4584036) | [10,000 PETITION SIGNATURES NEEDED BY 11:30 PM: CLICK TO ADD YOUR NAME TO SAVE THE POSTAL SERVICE FROM TRUMP'S ATTACKS »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/20480883/257160784/-1843026337?refcode=VC_UD_20201018_EMPET_E1_T0-S0SL0C0_IN-1_TrumpFOX-Postal_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4ZWNlNGI2LWExMTEtZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ewtbDHGXK0SVgaWDAPuIl2MkdtJW6DMQ2xJaJFbV5Ow=&emci=afd35fab-9811-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=c8ece4b6-a111-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=4584036)
---
Peter, the Postal Service is literally guaranteed in the Constitution!

It's an ESSENTIAL American institution that isn't _just_ about mail in ballots. They deliver all our mail, packages, and medications!

**But now that Trump installed a GOP Mega-Donor as Postmaster General, we might have to say _goodbye forever_ to the Postal Service.**

We can't let Trump get away with this plot to suppress millions of ballots in November. Democrats will be utterly doomed if he succeeds!

clean_body: We literally could not believe what we heard. | Peter -- We are seething with rage right now. Trump flat-out ADMITTED on FOX News that his plot to destroy to the Postal Service is all about ruining Vote-By-Mail. | Peter, the Postal Service is literally guaranteed in the Constitution! It's an ESSENTIAL American institution that isn't just about mail in ballots. They deliver all our mail, packages, and medications! But now that Trump installed a GOP Mega-Donor as Postmaster General, we might have to say goodbye forever to the Postal Service. name: Bill Olson
subject: Stop them, stop them now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFfVlwqm5F6OuRU&b=hiVJ.iShM4YFuKs7BToP.g

Hi Peter,

It's insane how much the Dems have gone crazy over Judge Amy Coney Barrett being nominated to the Supreme Court- but we will stop Nancy Pelosi and the Dems from derailing her nomination!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who dominated my primary and willwin alongside President Trump in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFfVlwqm5F6OuRU&b=hiVJ.iShM4YFuKs7BToP.g
!

What the far Left did to Justice Kavanaugh, assassinating the character of that good and decent man, was criminal and should have been prosecuted.

What they are doing to Judge Barrett is arguably worse!

Now understand: Judge Barrett's intellect and credentials are impeccable. I am thoroughly enjoying watching her school all of the liberal political hacks on the Judicial Committee.

The defining moment came when she was asked to show her notes for the hearing:

When Judge Amy Coney Barrett displayed that she was not using notes during Tuesday's Supreme Court confirmation hearing, the moment became just one of a few to go viral.

Conservatives applauded Barrett, calling her "THAT smart", but the moment also brought forth a wave of memes from both sides of the political aisle.

When Barrett cited various judges, cases, and laws as she discussed her career and how she would rule on the Supreme Court during the second day of her confirmation hearings, she did it all from memory.

As Sen. John Cornyn, R-Texas, started to question Barrett, he asked her to hold up the notebook sitting in front of her, noting most senators had multiple books and notebooks to reference.

That's right- Judge Barrett really IS that bright. She'll do a wonderful job on the Supreme Court.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFfVlwqm5F6OuRU&b=hiVJ.iShM4YFuKs7BToP.g

But then came the extremist Senator from Hawaii, "Crazy Mazie" Hirono.

She represents Hawaii, which is all but a single-party state. Look, she’s an attack dog. She says whatever the party feeds her, albeit she doesn’t do it well. In fact, she’s quite a disaster scene. Yet, there is one question that she says will be asked of all nominees to our courts, and that is if they ever committed sexual assault or harassment in their history. It’s a total pandering move. And you look abjectly stupid when you ask someone, like Judge Amy Coney Barrett, if she was ever accused of such behavior.

Then again, it’s Mazie. And yes, she did ask Judge Barrett if she raped anyone upon becoming a legal adult.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFfVlwqm5F6OuRU&b=hiVJ.iShM4YFuKs7BToP.g

If asking a Catholic mother of seven is somehow the "new normal", that's a good reason not to elect another Democrat ever again.

If Nancy Pelosi's threatening to pack the court if a Republican nominee goes through is the "new normal", that's a good reason to take the gavel out of her hands!

Are you a patriot like me, who just wants NORMAL normal? Then I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFfVlwqm5F6OuRU&b=hiVJ.iShM4YFuKs7BToP.g

Trump needs Florida, and Florida is in play. My district is a key swing district that has been held by the Republicans this decade, but is currently held by Pelosi sycophant Darren Soto.

If we take it back, Pelosi won't be Speaker, and Trump will win Florida. It's a must-win!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST Pelosi and the nutty liberals!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFfVlwqm5F6OuRU&b=hiVJ.iShM4YFuKs7BToP.g

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFfVlwqm5F6OuRU&b=hiVJ.iShM4YFuKs7BToP.g
today? We need to stay up on TV in the Orlando area- and we need your help this week, immediately, to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFfVlwqm5F6OuRU&b=hiVJ.iShM4YFuKs7BToP.g

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFfVlwqm5F6OuRU&b=hiVJ.iShM4YFuKs7BToP.g

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFfVlwqm5F6OuRU&b=hiVJ.iShM4YFuKs7BToP.g
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iFfVlwqm5F6OuRU&b=hiVJ.iShM4YFuKs7BToP.g
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

As a Biden supporter and an online donor, I’ve been getting a lot of emails from the Biden campaign.

At first I thought, I’ve already donated. Why do they keep asking?
Then I remember what’s at stake, and I donate again.

The campaign to elect Joe Biden is more than a campaign. It’s a strong, vibrant movement that I’m proud to be part of.

I know that individuals and families are struggling to get through this historically difficult time of multiple crises. But I also know that President Joe Biden, God willing, will make things less difficult.

If you can give $25, or even one dollar, for each of the next few weeks until the election, you, too, will be a part of this growing movement.

Will you donate today to help Joe Biden defeat Donald Trump? (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_oct2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.10_B2_carole_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-mc&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.10_B2_carole_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-mc)
